gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot pinning tiny pixelated polaroid photos to a corkboard in a warm garden shed. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
